title: Control of exemption clauses
summary: 9084 Contract — incorporation, construction, UCTA 1977, and CRA 2015 controls.
learningObjectives: Explain common law control: incorporation and contra proferentem.
Analyse CRA 2015 fairness test for consumers.
Apply cases: Thornton v Shoe Lane, Interfoto, R v CC for SSSE.

simpleExplanation.title: Limiting liability — within limits
simpleExplanation.summary: Exemption clauses must be incorporated fairly and construed narrowly — statute adds reasonableness and fairness tests especially for consumers.
steps: Construction — contra proferentem, main purpose rule.
CRA 2015 — unfair terms void in consumer contracts.
